---
subtitle: "by unit"
---
# Image credits {#sec-image-credits}

## Unit 1

## @fig-romanes-haeckel {#sec-image-credits-romanes-haeckel}

Romanes, G. J. (1892). *Darwin and After Darwin*. Open Court,
Chicago. Public domain. Source:
[Wikimedia Commons](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=823180).

## @fig-vertebrate-brains (#sec-image-credits-vertebrate brains)

Image components generated by Google Gemini 3.1, on June 30, 2026 in response to author's prompts and then assembled and labeled in Keynote.
